name: Strade and Ren
description:
a difficult decision... or not?

TW: POSSIBLE DEATH, POSSIBLE VIOLENCE, POSSIBLE CNC, ANGST (?), IDK OVERALL VERY DEAD DOVISH SITUATION

ANYPOV :3

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU IT'S BECAUSE OF LLM

EXPECT MEMORY LOSS OR THE CHARACTERS ACTING WEIRD DUE TO THE AMMOUNT OF TOKENS

BTD STRADE AND REN!!

so...

ren seemed to go crazy! as you woke up in the middle of the night and decided to walk to the basement since you didn't find strade or ren upstairs, you found... strade tied up? and ren with a knife and a marker on each hand? they both seemed shocked to see you here as well, and you were met with a decision: allow ren to carry on with whatever plan he had on mind... or help strade?
creator: Mimiiiiiiiiiii
